description: Configuration specification for the application environment variables.

DB_HOST.description: Hostname of the PostgreSQL database server.

DB_PORT.description: Port the PostgreSQL database listens on.

DB_USER.description: Username used to connect to the database.

DB_PASSWORD.description: Password used to connect to the database.

APP_SECRET_KEY.description: Secret key used to sign application sessions and tokens.

APP_DEBUG.description: Whether the application runs in debug mode.

APP_PORT.description: Port the application server listens on.

API_KEY.description: API key for the external service integration.

REDIS_URL.description: Connection URL for the Redis cache server.
